title: [極限挑戰]用10日獨遊半個日本

replies.msg:
是咁的
呢期個個都返唔到鄉下日本
我希望透過呢個遊記幫大家止下渴
順便share我自己自由行既經歷
因為係第一次寫所以可能會1999
請大家見諒

呢次遊記係2018年夏天
雖然唔係我第一次去日本
但係創造左我好多個第一次...
第一次自己去旅行
第一次用自己錢去旅行
第一次自己research諗行程
第一次搭新幹線
第一次訓火車
第一次見到雪 (?)
因為我冇車牌，今次全程都係搭火車/公共交通
所以為左就搭車時間，頭幾日chur到仆街
今次我既目標係睇景同國寶，但走馬看花居多
體能唔好或者方向感唔好既人切勿模仿我個行程
你應該會斷腳同蕩失路

樓主搭車方法的確抵，只要坐通票內包括的鐵路，係慳番唔少錢

不過我就唔會好像樓主這麼玩，一來坐車坐到累，二來唔係去到好多景點

立山黑部本身係個好難去既地方
除左交通極度複雜之外，天氣都好緊要
天氣唔好的話你上到去雪壁都唔俾行出去
要直接係個站度搭車走
浪費時間又浪費張飛

出發前keep住睇天氣報告
立山黑部係keep住落雨，可能去唔成
所以我有個備用方案係唔去長野
直接搭北陸新幹線去富山同金澤
但係天有眼，我出發前一日見到天氣12點後轉晴
我決定搏一搏落松本行一條不歸路(單程)
但係要注意幾樣野

1. JR跨區
我買左立山黑部加購票，包哂立山黑部阿爾卑斯山脈路線起點至終點所有交通
(而家加左價)
http://www.jrtateyama.com/tc/

起點松本/長野係JR東日本地頭
終點富山站係JR西日本地頭
如果你只係拎JR東日本/西日本Pass
係對家區間係要補錢搭
如果係北陸拱型Pass/我咁樣用Japan Rail Pass就唔駛補

2. 出發地點
立山黑部加購票剩係可以用單程 (長野->富山 / 富山->長野)
係JR東日本地頭你可以揀3個地方出發
a. 長野：東京去比較快，不過比較遠，頭班車好遲，去到立山黑部入口扇澤站都10點
b. 松本：長野同信濃大町中間，生活機能充足，酒店多選擇
c. 信濃大町：最近立山黑部路線既鄉下，長野同松本去立山黑部必經之地，附近有溫泉旅館，頭班車極早
我揀松本因為頭班車去扇澤站都係8點，可以早到早走

3. 行李
立山黑部可以有寄存服務
係起點放低行李同錢，4點後係終點就可拎到行李
但因為我太早到信濃大町，間舖頭未開
所以拎住1X kg行李登山
https://www.alpen-route.com/tw/transport/baggage.html

我見樓主 po 去犬山和名古屋的相，我係分享少少經驗

名鉄名古屋站是其中一個遊客搭車會頭痛的地方，除了樓主所講的問題之外，還有部分名鉄線會同名古屋地下鉄一齊作聯合行駛，所以計劃行程時要好小心，否則會搞到一團糟

先講由名古屋駅至犬山 / 犬山遊園駅要點搭：
1. 可以選直接寫犬山為總站的列車 (普通、急行、特急 * 都可以)
2. 另外選總站為新鵜沼或新可児為總站的列車 (普通、急行、特急 * 都可以)
* 特急列車只可以上一般車，特別車要加購 μTicket

離開時，除了好像樓主這樣搭翻去名古屋駅，還有另一個方法，順便遊埋名古屋城

犬山駅有一條叫小牧線，可以直達名古屋地下鉄的平安通駅，如果買左名古屋市營地下鉄一日卷，可先用 IC card 由犬山駅搭去上飯田駅，出閘再用一日卷入站 (我自己覺得有一點煩 ，但當時買左一日卷，無理由浪費) ，之後由平安通駅搭去上飯田駅，轉名城線搭去市役所駅落車就可以 ，遊完名古屋城後，由市役所駅搭去久屋大通駅，再轉櫻通線直接返名古屋駅

今次旅程有兩樣野我有預先做後備方案
1. 立山黑部好易受天氣影響去唔到
如果去唔到，當日就會去長野坐新幹線去富山同金澤繼續行程

2. 訓火車
如果去唔到，當晚會搭新幹線衝去東京訓1晚

係plan行程嗰陣，關於訓火車既野好難搵
一黎難book，二黎貴，三黎攞苦黎辛
台仔通常都係因為試既心態而唔係補錢book房
鐵膠group有人話要搵當地既fd專登book先有
而我去到日本先book 3日後既飛
本身都係預50/50

日本唯一寢台特急
サンライズ出雲 | サンライズ瀬戸
2架車構造完全一樣，每架車7卡
前者一日一班來回東京 <=> 出雲市
後者一日一班來回東京 <=> 高松
東京方向係岡山會合體14卡去東京
出雲市/高松方向就會係岡山分體
因為係夜晚開出，朝早到達目的地
所以叫做Sunrise Express

架車全車指定席
持有Japan Rail Pass可以免費劃位坐最低賤既座位
ノビノビ座席 (nobi nobi)
姐係集中營
上下格床，床頭有個窗，有被鋪同個膠杯俾你刷牙(請自備牙膏牙刷)
同隔離位只係有塊板遮住個頭，其他地方冇遮無檔
如果你窮/想同陌生人有深入既交流既話，呢個啱你
其他係獨立房，就要補特急同寝台料金
因為距離長，所以閒閒地都補幾千yen

係東京站排隊拎Pass嗰陣順便叫駅員劃位

但係驚訓訓下俾人偷野冇仇報

A寢台係最高級既單人房

I find the Japanese culture very different to the chinese culture. We enjoy yum cha whereas they enjoy drinking green tea at bars, soaking up the atmosphere rather than at home. My Japanese friend Jason is an Aries while his girlfriend is a Leo. He's faithful to her and would never cheat on her. When he broke up with his ex, he was driven over the edge. Even when a stranger talked to him, there was a definite edge of hostility to his voice. But as soon as he had a new relationship target, it took the edge of his emotional upset. His ex is a swimming champion who far outshines us in any swimming styles. She's tall and lean who definitely has the edge over lots of swimmers. Recently, Naoki was in scuffles with a guy who was hitting on his girlfriend. The police showed up later and assigned jealousy as the motive for the scuffles. Last Sunday, they dined in a restaurant in a hotel which is midway between his place and the post office. They stood in line outside the restaurant for almost an hour. The queue was so huge that it stretched from the counter through the lobby area and out the main entrance of the hotel. A stout guy tried to cut in line but was caught. We met at a midway point between his place and mine then he took me to the shuttle bus bound for his place. A group of people was in the way near the bus stop so he said "Excuse me." The queue was so big, stretching down the road to the furthest mini bus stop. We queued for half an hour until three shuttle buses came along at once. Meanwhile, some people mistook this long queue for the queue for other places. A couple came up to us and asked "Are you in the queue for Cluny Park?" as they wanna be sure that it's the right queue. A butoy man pushed in midway through the queue. Later, a slim guy jumped the queue. The lady behind him said "Excuse me. The end of the queue is back there." A woman stood beside a guy who was midway through the queue. While pretending to look at her phone, she edged furtively behind him who didn't realise she was there. Some people might have noticed it but ignored it. Jason seemed on edge. It turns out he has a job interview next week. Never has he felt so on edge before an interview. His elder brother is currently a head chef in a five-star hotel and feels he's found his niche. His younger brother has also found his niche as a professor, having worked as a researcher for three years. He sometimes takes a nap at lunchtime because he has so much work to do that he feels drained. He usually snoozes on the sofa by the fireplace or at his desk when everyone else's eating lunch outside. He once brought his work along to the library where I saw him doze off at the table. Having a doze especially in front of the fire is a marvelous way to replenish your energy though. His eldest brother has just completed his phd at Peking University and is on the way to becoming a professor. China is on the way to becoming the world's strongest economy. His elder sister is robust and healthy. She does lots of strength and conditioning exercises in her robust sneakers. After her gym session, she usually drinks a cup of robust coffee and a glass or robust wine. She lives in Japan where the economy and the political system are robust. His younger sister has opened an antique shop which created a favourable impression on me. There's an exquisite antique which engages my attention. I'll bet the shop engages lots of passers-by. I formed great impression of the store. Jason's uncle has recently passed away at the age of ninety. I offer my sincere condolences to his uncle's family. His friend Ed said "My condolences on the loss of your uncle." His mum sent her condolences to his uncle's family too. His dad wrote "Our condolences go to his family." Jason hadn't heard from his cousin for years until yesterday when he received a call from her.

日本每一個地方都有唔同既IC card
JR西日本為首有ICOCA
JR東日本為首有SUICA
關東私鐵為首有PASMO

係佢地加人左個交通IC card聯盟度之後先開始跨區互通

陣間上機冇野食
おぼんdeごはん 成田空港店 [Tabelog: 3.31]


呢間野專食和式定食
亦好貼心幫你分開唔同type既餐
有肉餐，魚餐，茶漬飯餐，丼物餐，烏冬餐
肉餐魚餐又有得揀唔同既飯
當然有menu可以散叫


魚餐 - メバルのネギ塩だれ定食
個餐賣相唔錯，好日式
有沙律，芝麻醬豆腐，薯仔沙律，主菜，味噌湯


藜麥飯，好健康


個炸魚淋左個鹽玻璃芡，簡簡單單
個炸魚仲係脆既，但唔厚粉，香口
點下個汁同茄粒令到個炸魚冇咁滯
呢間舖會係第四間我會encore既餐廳



以傳統築地既燒吞拿魚魚臉頰丼飯開頭
以新式和食既鹽醬炸魚藜麥飯套餐作結
以東京為開端，以東京作終結
好平淡咁開始，好平淡咁完結
一切歸於原點
呢一次旅程都冇遺憾了
